hero.title: I also speak
hero.description: SignBridge connects deaf patients with our healthcare professionals at Moscati Hospital through intuitive technology, ensuring clear, empathetic, and barrier-free medical care.

features.title: Everything you need for barrier-free communication
features.description: SignBridge offers advanced tools to facilitate communication between healthcare professionals and deaf patients.

signDetection.title: Sign Detection
signDetection.description: Real-time sign language recognition using artificial intelligence and computer vision.

textToSpeech.title: Text to Speech
textToSpeech.description: Converts translated text into natural voice so the patient can hear the professional.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.description: An intelligent assistant that helps interpret medical context and suggests appropriate responses.

progressTracking.title: Progress Tracking
progressTracking.description: Monitor consultation history and improve communication with each interaction.

bidirectional.title: Bidirectional Communication
bidirectional.description: Enables communication in both directions: from doctor to patient and from patient to doctor.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Detailed statistics on usage, translations performed, and service quality metrics.

mobile.title: Mobile Access
mobile.description: Use SignBridge from any device, including tablets in medical offices.

vocabulary.title: Medical Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Specialized library of medical signs for accurate consultations.

progress.title: Consultation History
progress.description: Complete record of all translations and consultations performed.

assistant.title: SignBridge Assistant
assistant.description: Contextual AI that understands medical terminology and facilitates communication.
assistant.youSample: How do I explain the diagnosis to the patient?
assistant.aiSample: I suggest using simple signs for 'diagnosis'. I can help you translate the results step by step.

items.quote: SignBridge has transformed the way I care for my deaf patients. Communication is now fluid and empathetic.
items.name: Dr. María González

items.quote: For the first time I felt truly understood in a medical consultation. This tool changes lives.
items.name: Ana Torres

items.quote: The accuracy of sign detection is impressive. It greatly facilitates our daily work.
items.name: Dr. Carlos Ruiz

items.quote: A necessary solution that should be in every hospital. Technology at the service of inclusion.
items.name: Laura Méndez

cta.title: Barrier-free communication starts here
cta.description: Join the healthcare professionals who are already transforming medical care for deaf patients with SignBridge.

footer.description: Inclusive technology to connect healthcare professionals with deaf patients.
